detectors.description:
Reentrancy in PrivateDeposit.CashOut(uint256) (PrivateDeposit.sol#81-101):
	External calls:
	- msg.sender.call.value(_am)() (PrivateDeposit.sol#89)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- balances[msg.sender] -= _am (PrivateDeposit.sol#93)
	PrivateDeposit.balances (PrivateDeposit.sol#9) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- PrivateDeposit.CashOut(uint256) (PrivateDeposit.sol#81-101)
	- PrivateDeposit.Deposit() (PrivateDeposit.sol#59-77)
	- PrivateDeposit.balances (PrivateDeposit.sol#9)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [PrivateDeposit.CashOut(uint256)](PrivateDeposit.sol#L81-L101):
	External calls:
	- [msg.sender.call.value(_am)()](PrivateDeposit.sol#L89)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [balances[msg.sender] -= _am](PrivateDeposit.sol#L93)
	[PrivateDeposit.balances](PrivateDeposit.sol#L9) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [PrivateDeposit.CashOut(uint256)](PrivateDeposit.sol#L81-L101)
	- [PrivateDeposit.Deposit()](PrivateDeposit.sol#L59-L77)
	- [PrivateDeposit.balances](PrivateDeposit.sol#L9)
